author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Added 19 missing keys to docs_src/reference/hook-config.qmd: appended 5 to '## Fields' (tracker_remote, external-cache-ttl, external-url-ttl, repo-alias, sandbox.command), introduced '## Agent overrides' with 5 sub-keys, and '## Sentinel configuration' with 13 sub-keys grouped under sources/default_agent/escalation. Each entry follows the existing format (key, type, default, 1-3 sentences). sandbox.command also gets a 'Local sandbox alternative' subsection in docs_src/guides/container-agents.qmd cross-linked back via an explicit {#sandbox-command} anchor. Defaults sourced from resources/crosslink/hook-config.json + config_registry.rs. 2 files, +165 lines, no code surface touched.
